# Bow of the Lightning God
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Bow%20of%20the%20Lightning%20God&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Bow of the Lightning God
| slot = bow
| tier = UT
| rarity = h
| desc = A bow once used by the lightning God, it shoots lightning-fast projectiles that the eye can barley see

| rof = 80
| range = 
| projSpeed = 
| lifetime = 
| minDmg = 100
| maxDmg = 130
| shots = 2
| feedp = 666
| fameb = 6

| effects = yes
| multihit = yes

| lootbag = white
|range2 = 5}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Bows]]
{{NavBows}}
</noinclude>
